state-changing.confirmation_message: This action will execute a state-changing terminal command or filesystem operation inside the secure worker container.

external-write.confirmation_message: WARNING: This action performs an external write (e.g. pushing a feature branch or opening a Pull Request). Proceed with caution.

destructive.confirmation_message: CAUTION: This action is destructive and irreversible (e.g. terminating/wiping a sandbox). Ensure all critical artifacts have been saved.
